A Designer’s Faux Pas

Making stuff one mmistake at a time.

Made Mistakes is the personal website of Michael Rose. A boring, tattooed, time traveling designer from Buffalo, New York who enjoys eating chicken wings and sketching on an iPad — not necessarily at the same time.

Paper for iPad Tips & Tricks

Mastering Paper by 53: Erasing and Correcting

October 25, 2014

Learn how to use Paper by 53's eraser tool to correct and cover-up mistakes.

Paper 2.0.0 Bugs and Other Strange Behaviors

September 28, 2014

Documented bugs and other strange behaviors found in Paper by 53 version 2.0.0 when using Pencil.

Paper Quick Tip: Watercolor Brush Improvements

September 16, 2014

Not only did FiftyThree release Mix today, but they also snuck in a few improvements to the watercolor brush tool…

Paper Creators, Join Me in FiftyThree’s Mix

September 16, 2014

FiftyThree’s Mix makes finding, sharing, and learning from inspiring Paper creators easy and fun.

Skinny Bones, a Jekyll Starter

September 02, 2014

A responsive, fully realized, and lightweight website starter for Jekyll.

August 29, 2014

A look back at two years of drawing over 800 portraits using an iPad and Paper by 53.

August 24, 2014
